texanshootR 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Getting started with texanshootR
  • Changelog

Package index

Run a search

Fit a battery of candidate specifications and inspect the result.

shoot()
Run an exploratory model search
run_log()
Browse persisted run history

Persistent career

Inspect career state, achievements, cosmetics, and unlock progress.

career()
Inspect career state
achievements()
Inspect the achievement registry
wardrobe()
Inspect or modify the mascot wardrobe
progress()
Inspect API unlock progress

Output generators

Turn a run into a manuscript, preprint, presentation, or other artefact.

manuscript()
Generate a manuscript from a run
preprint()
Generate a preprint HTML
presentation()
Generate a chaotic conference-style PPTX
reviewer_response()
Generate a response-to-reviewers DOCX
graphical_abstract()
Generate a graphical abstract PNG
funding()
Generate a funding letter + budget DOCX

Resets and configuration

reset_career() reset_achievements() reset_wardrobe() reset_all()
Reset persisted texanshootR state
texanshootR-options
Package options for texanshootR

Internals

Vocabulary inspection and message-pack validation.

validate_messages()
Validate the on-disk message registry
vocab_tags vocab_phases vocab_careers vocab_mascot_states vocab_effects career_levels()
Controlled vocabularies for the message and event registries

On this page

Developed by Gilles Colling.
